reviews.review_description: This zombie killing game is super fun. It's a challenge with each level which can get frustrating but perseverance will make you better. The best zombie game for the GO in my opinion.
Awesome game! The guns look great in your hand, and the zombies look amazing up close!

Not a tech guy, first time even seeing one...... with that being said, when u grow up with pong, or duck hunt,....... this is simply amazing!!!!  Thank you for making easy to play and understand for the ward working over 40’S!!!
This game is worth every cent and much more! Awesome gameplay, good quality, nice story.

I consider myself a very competent gamer. However I could not finish the last few levels of this app. Besides that the game is awesome! Great graffics fun gameplay but just don't expect to see the ending

reviews.review_title: Its as good as they say
reviews.review_description: So this has been heavily reviewed not much i can add except expect something with alot of depth great controls but its not "spooky" more arcade feel so doesnt match the atmosphere as some games but it is highly priduced well acted and content galore

The single campaign is great. The multiplayer is awesome. Great cooperative playing and communication. Gameplay is great. When the zombies are on you, you are falling back in your seat. Only issue is it is not easy to invite friends for multi player.
What’s a vr without a FPS and a great one.
They need to fix the reloading the gun faster
This is the one and only best game for oculus go. Thanks for the developers.
Exactly what the title says!!!
just bought this but can't play as i am unable to create an avatar which is required to start game...new go user :(
The BEST game on oculus go.
Lot of action. Run smoothly with no bugs

reviews.review_title: It’s fun. First VR game I purchased
reviews.review_description: It’s pretty good. It was my first game purchase for the Oculus Go. Only played the first 5-6 levels and have enjoyed the game thus far.
My girlfriend and I purchased this game, and have zero regrets! It is very fun, and easy to pick up and play! Give it a try, you wont regret!
Good

One of the first VR games I've gotten and I must say I'm impressed.  Games like this one remind me of the arcade days back when CarnEvil and Time Crisis were big hits. Stationary standpoint bit the field of view makes you turn yourself instead of a solid screen which helps you immerse yourself into the game. Definitely recommend to play with sound on full blast!
What a rush! The controls are responsive and the action fast and furious. Worth spending money on.
Great for numpties like me who need a tutorial for new things!! I have played this once and love it already!! Graphics are great, fun shooting and the odd scare!
